note_d_naive: D-naive embeds file content in single prompt (1 forward pass). E does true multi-turn (2 forward passes + tool call). This makes D faster but E does more work. The mock benchmark is the apples-to-apples comparison.
note_tool_dedup: Tool dedup ratio is 1.0x on real GPU because file reads complete in <1ms — each agent's tool call finishes before the next agent arrives at the ToolPool. The inflight-Future dedup window only covers truly concurrent calls. On slow tools (web search, external API, 200ms+) the dedup ratio would be 50-200x as shown in the mock.

summary.why_not_under_10s: 7B model on A10G processes ~10 agents/sec for 2-turn tasks; 200 agents × 2 turns = 400 forward passes. GPU compute is the binding constraint, not scheduling.
summary.vs_old_dispatch_gate: Previous dispatch-gate scheduler took 36.5s for E N=200 multi-turn. New backpressure dispatch: 21.8s (40% improvement).
